overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character exploring a Gothic castle interior with stone walls and vaulted ceilings. The character walks through a corridor lined with classical busts and paintings, approaches a grand staircase with stained glass windows, and examines an ornate wall fountain in a side alcove.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic corridor with classical artwork and furniture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone corridor, passing wooden furniture and classical sculptures

entered.detail: small rectangular stained glass window high on the stone wall
wooden table with red tablecloth and various items on top
classical white marble bust sculpture on a wooden pedestal
simple wooden bench against the wall
pile of wooden crates and boxes
small framed painting depicting a landscape scene
large ornate framed painting of a dramatic landscape with clouds
decorative Gothic stone column with pointed arches

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow Gothic corridor with warm stone walls. A marble bust sits on a pedestal near a wooden bench, while paintings hang on the walls. The character passes wooden furniture and stacked crates as they move toward a large landscape painting at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with stained glass windows

events.description: corridor opens into grand staircase hall with ornate stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand stone staircase with tall arched stained glass windows

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with red carpet runner leading upward
tall arched stained glass windows with blue and gold designs
ornate wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a grand hall featuring a wide stone staircase with a red carpet. Tall stained glass windows with blue designs illuminate the area. The character approaches the stairs, passing wall sconces, while the large landscape painting moves to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner alcove with ornate wall fountain

events.description: turns right from staircase toward ornate wall fountain in side alcove
pauses briefly at fountain then turns back toward the staircase

agents.ego_description: examining the ornate wall fountain in the stone alcove, then turning back toward the staircase

entered.detail: ornate Gothic stone fountain built into the wall with water basin
decorative pointed arch niche framing the fountain

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a darker corner alcove featuring an ornate Gothic wall fountain with a stone basin. After examining the fountain, the character turns back, with the grand staircase now visible to the left. The stained glass windows are no longer in view as the character faces the alcove wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow Gothic corridor that opens into a grand hall before retreating into a secluded, shadowed alcove. It begins by following the character past marble busts, paintings, and stacked crates along warm stone walls, moving steadily toward a large landscape painting. As the corridor ends, the space expands into a vast hall where the painting shifts to the side and the camera approaches a wide stone staircase draped in a red carpet under the blue light of tall stained glass windows. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the light and into a darker corner, focusing on an ornate Gothic wall fountain with a stone basin. Finally, the camera pivots back from the alcove wall, leaving the stained glass behind and bringing the grand staircase back into view on the left.
